ai_summary: AJMERA REALTY & INFRA INDIA LTD. has divested its entire 36% shareholding in Ultra Tech Property Developers Private Limited for INR 1.73 Crore, effective July 10, 2026, thereby ceasing its associate company status. This transaction appears financially immaterial, as Ultra Tech contributed 0% to Ajmera's consolidated turnover and only 0.06% to its net worth in the last fiscal year. There are no apparent red flags, with the sale executed to an unrelated third party and having a negligible impact on the parent company's overall financial performance.
